description: 达人外联邮件/DM模板 — 不同合作模式的高回复率案例

examples.context: 美妆品牌联系TikTok美妆博主

email.subject: Hi Sarah — loved your 'drugstore dupes' series (collab idea inside)
email.body:
Hi Sarah,

I've been following your 'drugstore dupes' series since last month — the Rare Beauty blush dupe video was *chef's kiss* (2.3M views, well deserved!).

I'm [Name] from [Brand], and we make clean beauty products at accessible price points — basically what your audience is already looking for.

We'd love to send you our new Velvet Lip Stain collection (6 shades, retails $18 each) for an honest review. No script, no approval needed — your genuine opinion is what matters.

What we're offering:
- Full collection shipped free
- Exclusive 20% discount code for your followers
- Commission on sales through your link

Would you be open to trying them out? Happy to ship this week if you're interested.

Best,
[Name]

why_it_works: 开头提到具体内容证明真的看过
不要求念稿/审核，降低合作门槛
给达人粉丝折扣=帮达人提供价值
佣金模式=达人有动力推

email.subject: Sponsored review opportunity — [Brand] wireless earbuds ($XXX budget)
email.body:
Hi [Creator],

Your [specific video title] review was the most thorough breakdown I've seen — especially the latency test at [timestamp]. That's the kind of detail our engineering team appreciates.

We're launching our next-gen wireless earbuds [Model] on [Date] and looking for 3-5 tech reviewers for honest, sponsored reviews.

The product:
- ANC with 45dB reduction
- 40h total battery
- Multipoint connection
- Retails at $79

The deal:
- $[XXX] flat fee for a dedicated review
- Product to keep
- Early access (2 weeks before launch)
- No editorial control — we only ask for disclosure per FTC guidelines

Interested? I can send specs and a sample this week.

[Name]
[Brand] Partnerships

why_it_works: 预算透明，不浪费双方时间
Early access是达人看重的独家感
明确说no editorial control建立信任
提到FTC合规显示专业度

examples.context: 家居品牌联系小红书家居博主
examples.dm:
Hi [博主名]～

关注你好久了，你之前发的那个「出租屋改造」系列太有共鸣了，尤其是厨房收纳那篇（收藏了！）

我们是[品牌]，做极简风家居收纳的。最近出了一款磁吸刀架，看到你厨房改造那期里用的是传统刀座，觉得可能会喜欢这个～

想寄一个给你体验，不需要发笔记（当然如果你觉得好用愿意分享就更好了）。纯粹觉得你会用得上。

要不要给你寄一个？
why_it_works: 小红书DM比邮件更自然
不说'合作'，说'寄给你体验'，降低戒备
'不需要发笔记'反而让博主更愿意发
关联到博主具体内容场景

examples.context: 宠物用品品牌联系TikTok宠物博主（50-200万粉丝）

email.subject: Your cat's reaction to the crinkle toy 😂 — quick collab idea
email.body:
Hi [Creator Name],

That clip of your cat going absolutely feral for the crinkle tunnel has been living in my head rent-free for two weeks (you know the one — 1.4M views, the zoomies at the end).

I'm [Name] at [PetBrand], and we just launched a new line of interactive cat toys designed for exactly that kind of chaos energy.

I'd love to send you our full 'Chaos Collection' (retails $65) to film whatever natural reaction your cat has. No brief, no talking points. The last creator we worked with just set up the camera and let their cat do the rest — it got 2.8M views.

On our end:
- Full product kit shipped to you this week
- 15% affiliate commission on every sale through your link
- You own the content — we'll only reshare if you give permission

If the products don't resonate with your cat, no post needed. But if they do, we'd love to work together more formally.

Worth a try?

[Name]

why_it_works: 引用具体视频和数据（1.4M views）证明真实关注
提到另一个创作者案例（2.8M views）提供社会证明
承诺内容所有权消除创作者最大顾虑
给猫做决定的框架让整封信有趣且低压

examples.context: 户外运动品牌联系Instagram户外博主（1-10万粉丝）

email.subject: Your Patagonia shot from last week — are you based in the PNW?
email.body:
Hi [Creator],

Your shot from last week's Patagonia trek stopped my scroll completely — the light through the tent at golden hour is one of the best outdoor photos I've seen this month.

I'm [Name] from [OutdoorBrand]. We make lightweight hiking gear for people who take their trips seriously. Based on your feed, you're exactly our type of customer.

We're building a small group of micro-influencers (under 100K) for an ongoing ambassador program — we've found that smaller, more dedicated audiences convert better than big-name celebrities.

What we offer ambassadors:
- 40% off all products for personal use
- Commission structure: 15% on first 3 months, 20% after
- Access to new gear before public launch
- A feature spot in our quarterly 'Out There' newsletter (87K subscribers)

No content quotas, no forced posts. Just honest reviews when you use our gear.

Interested in hopping on a 15-minute call?

[Name]
email.followup_day5: Hey [Name] — just wanted to make sure my last message didn't get buried. Quick yes/no: would a 15-minute call make sense this week? Happy to share more details about the ambassador program either way.

why_it_works: 具体描述特定照片而非泛泛夸赞
解释为什么选择小账号（而非大账号）——给对方尊重感
Ambassador框架比一次性合作更有吸引力
无内容配额是微型网红最关心的条款
跟进邮件极短、直接问yes/no降低决策成本

examples.context: 新品上架后申请Vine计划（通过Seller Central操作，无需直接触达评测员）
examples.process_note: Amazon Vine无法直接联系评测员，需通过Seller Central > Advertising > Vine计划申请。以下为申请前内部评估清单。
pre_vine_checklist: 产品详情页完整，bullet points填满
ASIN评论数少于30条（Vine最适合新品）
库存充足（建议备货30单以上用于Vine配送）
产品定价合理（Vine费用按类别，通常$200/ASIN）

product_brief_for_vine.format: 在申请时需填写产品简介供Vine评测员参考
product_brief_for_vine.example: This is a compact HEPA H13 air purifier designed for bedrooms and small offices up to 300 sq ft. The key features are: (1) True HEPA H13 filter removes 99.97% of particles including PM2.5, (2) Near-silent operation at 22dB on sleep mode, (3) Covers 300 sq ft in one air cycle. No assembly required. Ships with one filter pre-installed. Reviewer note: the filter replacement indicator will activate after 2,000 hours — this is normal and expected.

why_vine_works: Vine评测员是Amazon优质评价者，评价质量高
早期评论对listing权重影响显著
Vine评测不能选择评测员，但可控制产品简介内容
适合新品，不适合已有大量评论的产品

examples.context: 家用电器品牌联系YouTube家用电器开箱频道（5-50万订阅）

email.subject: Review unit for your channel — [Brand] air fryer (shipping this week)
email.body:
Hi [Channel Name],

Your review of the [Competitor Air Fryer] six months ago was genuinely useful — you were the only reviewer who tested the actual temperature accuracy with a probe thermometer instead of just taking the display at face value. That's the kind of testing our product team pays attention to.

We're [Brand], and we have a new 6L air fryer ([Model]) launching in Q2. Before the public launch, we're sending review units to 8 channels.

What sets this one apart from what you've reviewed:
- Dual-zone cooking (two independent baskets at different temps simultaneously)
- 360° rapid convection, not just bottom-up heat
- Actual temperature accuracy ±5°C (we have the test data)

Review terms:
- Unit is yours to keep
- No approval or pre-review required
- We ask for FTC disclosure only
- If you prefer not to review positively, we still want your honest assessment — negative reviews help us improve

Want the unit? I can ship within 48 hours.

[Name]
[Brand] Media Relations
email.followup_day7: Hi [Name] — following up on the [Brand] air fryer from last week. Happy to answer any technical questions before you decide. If it's not the right fit for your channel right now, totally understand.

why_it_works: 称赞具体测试方法（温度探针）而非频道数据，表明真的看过
主动提到愿意接受差评——这是专业媒体关系的核心信任建立
列出与竞品的具体区别点（双分区、温度精度数据）
48小时发货承诺显示执行力

examples.context: 母婴品牌联系抖音母婴类达人（粉丝10-100万）
examples.dm:
你好，[达人名]老师～

刷到你上周那条「宝宝第一次吃辅食」的视频，弹幕里好多宝妈在问辅食工具怎么选，看到你用的那套辅食套装好像不太顺手。

我们是[品牌]，做婴儿辅食工具的，有一套专门针对你视频里那个场景的产品想寄给你试试——软头勺+带刻度储存罐+研磨碗，用一次就不想换别家的那种。

不要求挂链接，不要求发视频，你觉得好用自然愿意分享，不好用也欢迎告诉我哪里不行。

方便的话发一下收件地址？
why_it_works: 指出达人视频里的具体痛点场景，有针对性
主动说不挂链接不要求发视频，降低合作门槛
欢迎负面反馈建立真诚感
结尾直接问收件地址推动行动

examples.context: 家居品牌联系Shopee/TikTok Shop泰国或越南本地达人

email.subject: Collaboration Proposal — [Brand] Home Storage Products
email.body:
Dear [KOL Name],

I came across your home organization content on TikTok Shop Thailand — your kitchen storage video last month has been very helpful for many families.

I represent [Brand], a Chinese home storage brand currently expanding in Southeast Asia. We would like to invite you to be our product reviewer/ambassador in Thailand.

Our offer:
- Send you 3-5 products from our new collection (free of charge)
- Commission: 8-12% on all sales through your affiliate link
- Exclusive discount code for your followers (15% off)
- Preferred partnership for future product launches

Our products have good ratings on Shopee Thailand (4.7 average, 2,000+ reviews). We focus on practical, affordable storage solutions for urban apartments.

Would you be interested? We can send products within 5 business days.

Best regards,
[Name]
[Brand] SEA Partnerships

why_it_works: 东南亚达人偏好正式邮件格式
说明品牌在当地平台已有口碑（Shopee评分）
佣金比例明确（8-12%），东南亚达人对佣金敏感
提到未来优先合作机会，建立长期关系预期

examples.context: 户外装备品牌联系美国户外/运动播客

email.subject: Sponsorship inquiry — [Brand] for [Podcast Name] (natural fit)
email.body:
Hi [Host Name],

I listen to [Podcast Name] during my weekend trail runs — the episode with [Guest Name] on ultramarathon nutrition was exactly what I needed before my first 50K.

I'm [Name] from [OutdoorBrand]. We make lightweight trail running and hiking gear, and your listener demographic (serious outdoor enthusiasts, 28-45) overlaps almost perfectly with our customer profile.

I'd like to explore a sponsorship arrangement — specifically a mid-roll or host-read ad spot. We're not looking for a scripted ad; we'd prefer you describe the product in your own words after testing it. Authentic host-reads perform 4x better than produced ads in our experience.

What we're thinking:
- 2-3 episodes per month over 3 months
- You test the products yourself first (we ship a full kit)
- We provide talking points but you say it your way
- $[XXX] per episode or a flat 3-month rate

Happy to share our audience overlap data and past podcast performance if useful.

Worth a conversation?

[Name]

why_it_works: 提到具体剧集证明是真听众
强调Host-read而非脚本广告，符合播客文化
提供数据支撑（Host-read效果4倍）
表示愿意提供受众重叠数据，显示专业度

outreach_principles: 第一句话必须证明你看过对方内容，泛泛夸赞=批量模板=直接被忽略
说清楚'你要什么+给什么'，不要绕弯子
给达人的价值 > 你期望的回报（初次合作）
不同平台用不同语气：YouTube/Email偏正式，小红书/TikTok偏口语，东南亚偏正式
跟进不超过2次，间隔3-5天，第三次不回=放弃
允许差评政策是与专业内容创作者建立信任的最有效语句
明确FTC/当地广告法披露要求，显示专业度且降低创作者法律风险
